title: stevia glanduloso-pubescens
intro: Stevia glanduloso-pubescens, also known as the Brazilian stevia, is a plant species in the genus Stevia that is native to the subtropical regions of Brazil. This plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, particularly stevioside, which has been used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension, diabetes, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Stevia glanduloso-pubescens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce blood sugar levels, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Stevia glanduloso-pubescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or extract, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
